temperament: Hyper-enthusiastic, sincere, high-energy, encouraging, and socially overwhelming in a comic way.
motivation: Wants every freshman to feel welcomed, processed, and successfully launched into campus life.
speech: Fast, cheerful, exclamation-heavy, orientation-host energy, encourages people while pressuring them to keep moving.
relationships: Treats freshmen like a crowd she is determined to successfully onboard.
Creates immediate stress for Muci, but never from cruelty.
Feels perfectly normal to Sunny even when everyone else is overwhelmed.
